# Per-flag bundle-size cost (generated by harness/flag-size.mjs)

- date: 2026-07-23T05:59:38.739Z; git: a927790
- Marginal bundle size of turning ONE flag on (same app, everything else fixed; table app apps/ui-*). web = whole .web.bundle; mt/bg = lepusCode.root / app-service sections. Flag-off builds carry no residual (all axis reads go through the per-package flags modules), so deltas are true per-flag costs.

| flag | pair | Δweb (gz) | ΔMT (gz) | ΔBG (gz) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| +b (vapor naming block) | vapor-dense → vapor | +281 B gz (+0.6%) | +1 B gz (+0%) | +287 B gz (+0.8%) |
| +b! (vapor bundle delivery) | vapor → vapor-bang | +248 B gz (+0.5%) | +213 B gz (+2.6%) | +23 B gz (+0.1%) |
| +b:c (vapor code staging) | vapor → vapor-code | +757 B gz (+1.6%) | +684 B gz (+8.3%) | +52 B gz (+0.1%) |
| +b:e (vapor engine staging, stub on web) | vapor → vapor-engine | +718 B gz (+1.5%) | +718 B gz (+8.7%) | +6 B gz (+0%) |
| +ifr (vapor) | vapor → vapor-ifr | +41839 B gz (+89.8%) | +37483 B gz (+455.1%) | +4140 B gz (+10.9%) |
| +b (vdom element templates) | vdom → vdom-et | +1016 B gz (+2.6%) | +598 B gz (+7.3%) | +649 B gz (+2.1%) |
| +ifr (vdom) | vdom → vdom-ifr | +40505 B gz (+102.8%) | +30320 B gz (+368.1%) | +10230 B gz (+33.3%) |
| +b on top of +ifr (vdom) | vdom-ifr → vdom-ifr-et | +1359 B gz (+1.7%) | +670 B gz (+1.7%) | +652 B gz (+1.6%) |
